violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

Raw animal foods (fish) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (pasta) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

Pasta was observed held at 56 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved to ice bath. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

Various foods in the walk-in cooler were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
Sauce was observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

Inspector observed beverage tubing to be in direct contact with stored ice used for drinks. Beverage tubing installed in contact with ice may result in condensate and drippage contaminating the ice. PIC disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
Observed an accumulation of frost buildup in the following areas: 1. Freezer (1 door upstairs) 2. Freezer (1 door downstairs) New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the soda gun have an accumulation of black and brown residue. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The wall (ledge) in the ware washing area has exposed wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
